pr.title: Record(?): WARP (Word-Aware Representation Priors) — val_bpb 1.0713 | 1xH100 10min | 13.65 MB

output.summary: Augments a LeakyReLU-squared GQA stack with lightweight WARP modules injecting word-length, within-word positional, and word-type logit priors to restore boundary info.
techniques: Word-length embeddings at layer 0 plus within-word positional Q/K biases before RoPE
Word-type logit bias via a small classifier added to pre-softmax logits
EMA disabled on short runs while retaining Legal TTT and context-only SLOT stack
